# barracudawaf_data_theft_protection (Resource)

`barracudawaf_data_theft_protection` manages `Data Theft Protection` on the Barracuda Web Application Firewall.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "barracudawaf_data_theft_protection" "test_dtp" {
    name = "test_terraform_dtp"
    parent = [ "DefaultPolicy" ]
    enable = "Yes"
    identity_theft_type = "Credit Cards"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- **name** (String) Data Theft Element Name
- **parent** (List of String) Parent format: [policy_name]

### Optional

- **action** (String) Action
- **custom_identity_theft_type** (String) Custom Identity Theft Type
- **enable** (String) Enabled
- **identity_theft_type** (String) Identity Theft Type
- **initial_characters_to_keep** (String) Initial Characters to Keep
- **trailing_characters_to_keep** (String) Trailing Characters to Keep
